title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You could give Dia a real run for her money!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I know! It's not every day I can brag about
this to Dia, so I'm absolutely going to be doing
that!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll send a photo to my family... and maybe my
classmates too! Or I could decorate the classroom
with them. ♪
